utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these categories. Each section is fully specified with detailed sub-items and costs. Health coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and details. Property coverage includes home/contents insurance with cost and details. Travel coverage includes travel insurance with cost and details. Additional services include multiple enhancement services with costs (or inclusion status). Total budget provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four key insurance components: (1) Physical health insurance named 'plan_option556' costing €200/month, which corresponds to the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' in the ground-truth data (same cost, same 9.0 quality rating, similar description with global coverage, pre-existing conditions coverage, and 1–5 days claims processing). (2) Mental health insurance named 'LifeFirst Standard Package78' costing €130/month, but no exact match exists in the ground-truth list; however, 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' for mental health costs €130/month and has similar premium-tier family coverage and 24/7 support, so it most closely aligns with that plan. (3) Home contents insurance 'LifeFirst Comprehensive Package1' costing €95/month matches 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (same cost, premium tier, 9.5 quality). (4) Travel insurance 'LifeFirst Standard Plan18' costing €110/month matches 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (same cost, premium tier, 9.5 quality, global coverage, business travel protection, and emergency coordination). Therefore, the ratings mapped are: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) → 10, PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) → 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage → 10, and EliteTravel Premium Plan → 10.
